summary: Comprehensive testing of PropValu v2.4 features completed. All requested features verified working: Landing page loads, valuation form navigates correctly, dashboard has new charts for comparables vs subject, API health endpoint responds, report generator includes 'Parques' amenity (#6), report has 'DESGLOSE DE VALOR FÍSICO' title with Ross-Heidecke method, updated disclaimer with CNBV/SHF/INDAABIN methodology, land use only visible in valuer mode, differentiated footer for valuer vs public mode.
passed_tests: API GET /api/health - returns healthy ✅
API POST /api/valuations - creates valuation in public mode ✅
API POST /api/valuations/{id}/generate-comparables - generates 10-15 comparables ✅
API POST /api/valuations/{id}/calculate - calculates value with market_metrics ✅
API GET /api/property-types - returns property types list ✅
API GET /api/stats - returns platform statistics ✅
Report has 'DESGLOSE DE VALOR FÍSICO' title ✅
Report mentions Ross-Heidecke depreciation method ✅
Report includes 'Parques y espacios deportivos' amenity (#6) ✅
Report has 'AVISO LEGAL Y LIMITACIONES' updated disclaimer ✅
Report mentions CNBV/SHF/INDAABIN methodology ✅
Report states 'estimación orientativa' (not official valuation) ✅
Public mode report hides 'USO DE SUELO' section ✅
Public mode report hides 2km radius amenity note ✅
Public mode footer indicates automatic generation ✅
Landing page loads with PropValu branding ✅
Valuation form Step 1 (Ubicación) loads correctly ✅
Valuation form has state selector, municipality, neighborhood fields ✅
Valuation form has map integration ✅
Dashboard has getComparablesPricePerSqmData() chart function ✅
Dashboard has getComparablesMarketValueData() chart function ✅
Valuation data has comparables with price_per_sqm for charts ✅
seed_data_creation: Used existing valuation val_7348428e33a4 with 15 comparables. Created test valuations for API verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.4 features verified working. Key test valuation: val_7348428e33a4. Web scraping for comparables uses MOCKED/simulated data as fallback - this is expected behavior. The report_generator.py now includes: 1) 'Parques y espacios deportivos' as 6th amenity, 2) 'DESGLOSE DE VALOR FÍSICO' title with Ross-Heidecke method explanation, 3) Updated disclaimer with CNBV/SHF/INDAABIN methodology, 4) Land use section only visible in valuer mode (is_valuer_mode check), 5) 2km radius note for amenities only in valuer mode, 6) Differentiated footer for valuer vs public mode.

landing_page.details: PropValu branding, 'Comenzar Valuación' button, stats counter showing 64+ valuations

valuation_form.details: Step 1 (Ubicación) with state selector, municipality, neighborhood, map integration

chart_titles: Valor por m² - Comparables vs Sujeto
Valor de Mercado - Comparables vs Sujeto

report_value_breakdown.title: DESGLOSE DE VALOR FÍSICO
report_value_breakdown.method_mention: Ross-Heidecke: depreciación por edad y estado de conservación

land_use_visibility.valuer_mode: USO DE SUELO section visible with land use details

footer_differentiation.public_mode: Reporte generado automáticamente sin verificación de perito valuador

2km_radius_note.valuer_mode: Note visible: 'Búsqueda verificada en radio de 2 km a la redonda'

mocked_apis.web_scraping: Comparables from inmuebles24, lamudi, vivanuncios, propiedades.com fall back to simulated data when real scraping fails
